2604.06156.title: MMEmb-R1: Reasoning-Enhanced Multimodal Embedding with Pair-Aware Selection and Adaptive Control
2604.06156.paper_summary: MLLMs have been successfully applied to multimodal embedding tasks, yet their generative reasoning capabilities remain underutilized. Directly incorporating chain-of-thought reasoning into embedding learning introduces two fundamental challenges. First, structural misalignment between instance-level reasoning and pairwise contrastive supervision may lead to shortcut behavior, where the model merely learns the superficial format of reasoning. Second, reasoning is not universally beneficial for embedding tasks. Enforcing reasoning for all inputs may introduce unnecessary computation and latency, and can even obscure salient semantic signals for simple cases. To address these issues, we propose MMEmb-R1, an adaptive reasoning-based multimodal embedding framework. We formulate reasoning as a latent variable and introduce pair-aware reasoning selection that employs counterfactual intervention to identify reasoning paths beneficial for query-target alignment. Furthermore, we adopt reinforcement learning to selectively invoke reasoning only when necessary. Experiments on the MMEB-V2 benchmark demonstrate that our model achieves a score of 71.2 with only 4B parameters, establishing a new state-of-the-art while significantly reducing reasoning overhead and inference latency.
2604.06156.paper_summary_zh: MLLMs 已成功應用於多模態嵌入任務，但其生成推理能力仍未得到充分利用。<lb/>將思維鏈推理直接納入嵌入學習引入了兩個基本挑戰。<lb/>首先，實例級推理與成對對比監督之間的結構不對齊可能導致捷徑行為，模型僅僅學習推理的表面格式。<lb/>其次，推理並不對所有嵌入任務普遍有益。<lb/>對所有輸入強制推理可能會引入不必要的計算和延遲，甚至可能掩蓋簡單情況下的顯著語義信號。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 MMEmb-R1，一個基於自適應推理的多模態嵌入框架。<lb/>我們將推理形式化為潛在變量，並引入成對感知的推理選擇，利用反事實干預來識別有利於查詢-目標對齊的推理路徑。<lb/>此外，我們採用強化學習來選擇性地在必要時調用推理。<lb/>在 MMEB-V2 基準上的實驗表明，我們的模型在僅有 4B 參數的情況下達到了 71.2 的得分，建立了新的最先進水平，同時顯著減少了推理開銷和推理延遲。
2604.06156.author: Yuchi Wang et.al.
2604.06156.authors: Yuchi Wang, Haiyang Yu, Weikang Bian, Jiefeng Long, Xiao Liang, Chao Feng, Hongsheng Li
